ask.holdMic: Tap to talk, tap again to stop
mic.unsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser — try Chrome
agent.core.desc: The conductor: understands requests, routes between departments, talks to you
agent.interrogator.desc: Crafts 5 precise questions tailored to your idea
agent.architect.desc: Turns your answers into a spec: pages, features, data
agent.designer.desc: Color palette, typography, layout and mood
agent.connector.desc: Finds real free APIs and wires live data into the site
agent.coder.desc: Generates the complete code files of the site
agent.qa.desc: Scans the code: errors, responsiveness, RTL, accessibility
agent.deployer.desc: Track A: repo + Pages. Track B: spec + prompt package
settings.title: Settings
settings.brain.puter: Puter — free Claude, no key needed (default)
settings.brain.gemini: Gemini — free key from Google AI Studio
settings.brain.claude: Claude API — paid key from Anthropic
settings.githubToken.help: Token with Contents + Pages + Administration permissions (or a classic token with repo scope). Stored only on this device.
settings.keysLocal: All keys are stored only in this device's localStorage — never in code, never in the cloud.
settings.logo.help: Round 1024×1024 logo with a transparent surround — perfect as a profile picture for email, WhatsApp and socials.
settings.convex.on: Connected — projects sync to the cloud, available on every device
settings.convex.off: Not configured — saving locally on this device. Connect Convex to sync across devices.
boot.greeting: Yairos systems online. How can I help, sir?
chips.business: Build me a site for my business
chips.trackA: Track A — build & deploy it yourself
chips.trackB: Track B — spec + prompt for me
spec.title: Specification
package.title: Track B package — spec + prompt
transcript.empty: No conversation yet. Tap the mic or type below.
err.noGithubToken: To deploy on Track A I need a GitHub Token — add it in Settings, then choose Track A again.
err.brainFailed: Provider {provider} failed: {error}. You can switch providers in Settings.
run.interrogator: Interrogation dept. is crafting 5 precise questions…
run.question: Question {n}/5: {q}
run.architect: Architecture dept. is writing the spec…
run.designer: Design dept. is adding the design layer…
run.specReady: The spec is ready above. Track A — I build and deploy it myself, or Track B — a spec + perfect prompt for you?
run.connector: Connector dept. is finding real data sources…
run.coder: Code dept. is writing the site files…
run.qa: QA dept. is scanning and fixing…
run.deploying: Deploy dept. is pushing to GitHub Pages…
run.packaging: Deploy dept. is preparing the Track B package…
run.packageReady: Track B package is ready — full spec and a perfect build prompt. Copy or download above.
run.whichProject: I couldn't find a matching live project. Which project do you mean?
projects.title: My projects
projects.empty: No projects yet. Ask Yairos to build a site — it will show up here.
projects.chatEmpty: This is this project's own chat — everything here is saved with it. Ask for changes, questions and updates.
